title: ValidationAlgorithm
description: Accepted cryptographic signature algorithms for credential signing and verification

ES256.description: ECDSA with P-256 curve and SHA-256

ES384.description: ECDSA with P-384 curve and SHA-384

ES512.description: ECDSA with P-521 curve and SHA-512

BBS_BLS12381_SHA256.description: BBS+ signature scheme with BLS12-381 curve and SHA-256 hash-to-curve. Provides unlinkable selective disclosure for JSON-LD Verifiable Credentials.
BBS_BLS12381_SHA256.use_case: JSON_LD credentials requiring unlinkable selective disclosure

BBS_BLS12381_SHAKE256.description: BBS+ signature scheme with BLS12-381 curve and SHAKE-256 hash-to-curve. Alternative hash function variant for BBS+ signatures.
BBS_BLS12381_SHAKE256.use_case: JSON_LD credentials requiring unlinkable selective disclosure

deprecated.RS256_1024: RS256 with key size < 2048 bits is rejected
deprecated.HS256: HMAC-based algorithms are not accepted for credential signing
